menu_paths: IntelliDealer Menus > Product Support > Equipment Product Support > Equipment Invoicing: Listing
purpose: reverse the sales of a stock number
view or edit an equipment invoice
To open the Equipment Invoicing screen, navigate to Product Support > Equipment > Equipment
Click on the View Details icon next to the Pending Equipment Sales field on the Sales Support Portal
The sorting options on the Equipment Invoicing screen are:
Reference Number Sort the search results by reference number
Customer                 Sort the search results by customer
buttons: Reverse the sales of a stock number

fields.name: Customer
fields.description: Sort the search results by customer.

fields.name: Select Reference
fields.description: Search for equipment invoices by entering a reference number. Number

fields.name: Select Salesperson
fields.description: Search for equipment invoices by entering a salesperson.

fields.name: Show Extended
fields.description: If selected, includes extended equipment description within the invoice search

fields.name: Description
fields.description: results.

fields.name: Select Stock Number
fields.description: Search for equipment invoices by entering a stock number.

fields.name: Select Location
fields.description: Search for equipment invoices by entering a location.

fields.name: Select Status
fields.description: Search for equipment invoices by selecting an invoice status from the drop down list.

fields.name: Reference
fields.description: The reference number for the equipment invoice. Used to locate and identify equipment

fields.name: Number
fields.description: invoices throughout the system.

fields.name: Salesperson
fields.description: The salesperson assigned to the equipment invoice.

fields.name: Stock
fields.description: The stock number of the unit. Number

fields.name: Location
fields.description: The branch location of the equipment invoice.

fields.name: Date Added
fields.description: The date the equipment invoice was created.

fields.name: Invoice
fields.description: The status of the equipment invoice Status Pending—the invoice is not yet been processed.

fields.name: VESign
fields.description: The signing status of the VESign document. Can be one of: Status Awaiting Signature—all signatures are pending. Partially Signed—more than one signature is pending. Signed—all required signatures are complete. Canceled—signing has been canceled. If no status is present, then the document has not been sent for electronic signing. IntelliDealer checks for a status update every 30 minutes.
